overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a leather coat walking through a historic stone archway into a wet urban street. The environment transitions from a covered medieval-style passage to an open modern city intersection with mixed architecture and light pedestrian traffic.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone archway toward the city exit

entered.detail: large gothic stone archway with pointed ceiling and heavy wooden doors
black banner with gold Albion logo and crown symbol
black banner with gold Albion logo and crown symbol
tall weathered stone brick wall with arched niches and planters
tall weathered stone brick wall with arched niches and metal railing

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone archway with high vaulted ceilings. Black banners with gold insignia hang on the stone walls. The cobblestone path leads forward toward the bright exit of the archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet urban intersection with mixed historic and modern architecture

events.description: exits the covered stone archway into the open city street with bright overcast sky
white car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the city streets, approaching and navigating the intersection while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking across the wet street
white sedan driving along the road

entered.detail: multi-story modern building with glass windows and ground floor burger restaurant
large industrial red brick building with tall arched windows
building with large vibrant mural on the side facing the intersection
rain-soaked asphalt streets with reflections of buildings and cloudy sky
wooden slatted bench with metal frame on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Exiting the archway, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection with wet streets reflecting the overcast sky. A modern corner building with a ground floor restaurant stands on the right while red brick warehouses line the left. Sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalks and cars pass by on the road.

events.description: character turns left to cross the street at the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and beginning to cross the street

notable_agents.action: person in grey sweatshirt with pink graphic walking past in the opposite direction

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the intersection, entering the crosswalk. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction. The modern corner building recedes behind as the character faces a new street with the red brick warehouse now in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed atmosphere of a medieval stone passage into the open expanse of a wet, modern city intersection. It begins with the character walking through a covered archway featuring high vaulted ceilings and black banners with gold insignia hanging from the walls. As the character reaches the end of the cobblestone path, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where the overcast sky reflects off the damp streets, flanked by a modern restaurant building and red brick warehouses. The camera then follows the character as they turn left and enter a crosswalk, passing a pedestrian in the opposite direction. Finally, the modern corner building recedes from view as the character advances toward a new street with the warehouses stretching into the distance.
